items.name: cell-square-1
items.title: Neon Drift
items.description: Same ripple family as the icon, with a wave that sweeps from the top-right toward the bottom-left.

items.name: cell-square-2
items.title: Pulse Ladder
items.description: Clockwise snake route: starts bottom-left up column 1, jumps to column 3 down, then column 2 up, and continues the same cycle to the right.

items.name: cell-square-3
items.title: Core Spiral
items.description: A 4-dot tail spirals clockwise from the outer border toward the center of the 5x5 grid.

items.name: cell-square-4
items.title: Twin Orbit
items.description: Outer ring snake moves clockwise, middle ring snake moves anticlockwise, and the center dot stays inactive.

items.name: cell-square-5
items.title: Prism Sweep
items.description: Snake-style trail that traverses the 5x5 grid on alternating diagonals.

items.name: cell-square-6
items.title: Flux Columns
items.description: Five simultaneous snakes: columns 1/3/5 move up while columns 2/4 move down.

items.name: cell-square-7
items.title: Block Drop
items.description: Tetromino-like frames drop and stack in a 5x5 matrix, then flash a row-clear beat.

items.name: cell-square-8
items.title: Strobe Stack
items.description: Each column stacks upward on a stagger (Tetris-style), the full grid blinks twice, then columns drain downward with the same stagger.

items.name: cell-square-9
items.title: Glyph Pulse
items.description: Two synced 2×3 cells (Unicode dot order) step through clear motifs: rails, full grid, three rows, checker, horseshoes, and alternating columns.

items.name: cell-square-10
items.title: CRT Glide
items.description: A CRT-style horizontal scanline moves down the matrix; swept rows leave a soft phosphor trail with a slight column-wise warp.

items.name: cell-square-11
items.title: Echo Ring
items.description: Concentric diamond ripple with a soft secondary echo pulse per ring.

items.name: cell-square-12
items.title: Origin Wave
items.description: Ripple starts at cell (2,2) and expands outward in concentric rings.

items.name: cell-square-13
items.title: Core Rotor
items.description: Single fan blade rotating around a center hub for a clean, readable loop.

items.name: cell-square-14
items.title: Prism Bloom
items.description: A symmetric kaleidoscope bloom cycling through clean radial motifs.

items.name: cell-square-15
items.title: Helix Glow
items.description: Two mirrored strands with periodic bridges pulse like a compact DNA helix.

items.name: cell-square-16
items.title: Helix Core
items.description: A narrower helix variant that stays in the center band while preserving strand/rung rhythm.

items.name: cell-square-17
items.title: Half Helix
items.description: Single-strand helix variant that shows one side of the DNA wave.

items.name: cell-square-18
items.title: Sound Bars
items.description: Equalizer-style vertical bars that pulse like live music levels.

items.name: cell-square-19
items.title: Infinity Run
items.description: Dual counter-rotating heads trace a figure-eight with a soft crossover pulse at center.

items.name: cell-square-20
items.title: Mobius Run
items.description: A bright head and tail run around the outer ring; a dimmer second train stays half a lap behind, with inner corner flashes for the twist.

items.name: cell-orbit-1
items.title: Halo Drift
items.description: A circular-masked half-helix that travels diagonally from top-left to bottom-right with a bright strand and soft adjacent trail.

items.name: cell-orbit-2
items.title: Tri Orbit
items.description: Three luminous heads orbit the circular ring at equal offsets, creating a triad chase that never overlaps into the old snake rhythm.

items.name: cell-orbit-3
items.title: Plasma Veil
items.description: A plasma-like diagonal sweep and pulsing core weave through the circular mask for a distinctly different motion signature.

items.name: cell-orbit-4
items.title: Radar Arc
items.description: A rotating radar arm scans the circular grid with a bright beam front, soft wake, and faint perimeter ring echo.

items.name: cell-orbit-5
items.title: Nova Wheel
items.description: Four rotating pinwheel blades spin through the circular matrix with a glowing center and soft trailing halo.

items.name: cell-orbit-6
items.title: Phase Orb
items.description: An off-center orbiting energy point traces a phase-shifted loop, creating a drifting orbital glow inside the circular matrix.

items.name: cell-orbit-7
items.title: Gate Shift
items.description: A scanning gate flips between vertical and horizontal sweeps, producing a crisp alternating shutter rhythm in the circular grid.

items.name: cell-orbit-8
items.title: Heart Pulse
items.description: Pulse bursts from the center with a dual-beat cadence, sending soft concentric pressure waves across the circular matrix.

items.name: cell-orbit-9
items.title: Star Compass
items.description: A cardinal beacon pattern: N/E/S/W sectors pulse in sequence with a dim opposite echo, creating a clear directional rhythm in the circular mask.

items.name: cell-orbit-10
items.title: Binary Bloom
items.description: Binary-style opacity tiers pulse in modular steps so only a few cells peak at once while others stay low, producing a crisp coded bloom.

items.name: cell-orbit-11
items.title: Lunar Breathe
items.description: A rotating crescent moon silhouette: bright lunar body, soft rim, and faint directional halo moving around the circular mask.

items.name: cell-orbit-12
items.title: Arc Beacon
items.description: A stepped 8-direction beacon beam sweeps around the circle with a dim opposite echo and diagonal spoke accents.

items.name: cell-orbit-13
items.title: Twin Helix
items.description: A circular-masked twin-helix: mirrored side strands weave inward and outward with intermittent interior bridge pulses.

items.name: cell-orbit-14
items.title: Rung Shift
items.description: A shifting DNA ladder where a bright horizontal rung steps row-by-row while side anchors sway and leave soft ghost echoes.

items.name: cell-orbit-15
items.title: Glyph Cluster
items.description: Braille-inspired grouped dot motifs cycle through rails, bridges, and cross forms inside the circular mask with crisp tiered opacity.

items.name: cell-orbit-16
items.title: Rail Scan
items.description: A braille rail scanline sweeps row-by-row between left and right cells, with near-column accents and soft trail falloff.

items.name: cell-orbit-17
items.title: Checker Shift
items.description: Braille-biased checker phases alternate in stepped shifts, keeping rails pronounced while the center cross supports readability.

items.name: cell-orbit-18
items.title: Pulse Pair
items.description: Mirrored braille dot pairs pulse from top and bottom toward the center, with a connective center-column accent.

items.name: cell-orbit-19
items.title: Orbit Cell
items.description: A bright braille cell head orbits the inner ring with a dim tail while rail columns remain softly active.

items.name: cell-orbit-20
items.title: Glyph Cycle
items.description: Distinct braille-like glyphs cycle in sequence with previous-frame ghosting for a crisp readable symbol transition.

items.name: cell-angle-1
items.title: Core Spokes
items.description: A triangle-masked matrix where three spoke lines originate at the center and travel outward to each triangle edge.

items.name: cell-angle-2
items.title: Altitude Wave
items.description: A soft altitude wave travels between apex and base while the center column remains gently present for shape readability.

items.name: cell-angle-3
items.title: Corner Bounce
items.description: A single head bounces between triangle corners along the perimeter path with a short fading tail.

items.name: cell-angle-4
items.title: Vertex Chase
items.description: Three staggered heads chase around the triangle perimeter, leaving short fading tails while all dots stay fixed in place.

items.name: cell-angle-5
items.title: Row Sweep
items.description: A reflected scanline sweeps from apex to base and back, animating only opacity bands across triangle rows.

items.name: cell-angle-6
items.title: Braille Beat
items.description: Triangle-masked braille dots fill down the left rail, then the right, then blink full and empty.

items.name: cell-angle-7
items.title: Oblique Weave
items.description: Diagonal harmonics keyed on row + col: bright bands glide along oblique lines through the triangle with a subtle second harmonic for texture.

items.name: cell-angle-8
items.title: Wing Metronome
items.description: The lower triangle splits into left and right wings that trade emphasis on a pendulum beat; apex and center pulse brightest when both sides meet in the middle.

items.name: cell-angle-9
items.title: Corona Tier
items.description: Eight-connected distance rings from the heart cell: a bright corona sweeps outward through discrete tiers then back, so depth reads as concentric energy shells.

items.name: cell-angle-10
items.title: Column Rake
items.description: A stepped head and tail snake the mask in strict column order (bottom to top per column, columns left to right), unlike perimeter chases or diagonal waves.

items.name: cell-angle-11
items.title: Shelf Descent
items.description: Cosine bands keyed on Manhattan distance from the apex (not the center): energy reads as horizontal tiers dropping through the triangle.

items.name: cell-angle-12
items.title: Skew Drift
items.description: Traveling harmonics on `row - col` so bright ridges move along NE–SW obliques, orthogonal in feel to diagonal loaders that use `row + col`.

items.name: cell-angle-13
items.title: Serpent Zip
items.description: A stepped snake follows row-wise serpentine order (base left→right, then alternating row directions) with a long tail — zigzag motion, not a column path.

items.name: cell-angle-14
items.title: Pillar Sweep
items.description: A smooth vertical beam sweeps grid columns 0→6; only triangle-masked dots respond so the silhouette lights one vertical slice at a time.

items.name: cell-angle-15
items.title: Tripod Handoff
items.description: Brightness hands off smoothly among the three silhouette vertices (apex, left base, right base) with Manhattan falloff — a corner-to-corner orbit, not a mod-3 lattice.

items.name: cell-angle-16
items.title: Updraft
items.description: A V-shaped thermal ridge moves through row-and-column space: brightness peaks along an inverted V so the front climbs the two lower flanks toward the apex, not a flat horizontal row scan like Row Sweep.

items.name: cell-angle-17
items.title: Infinity Trace
items.description: A stepped head and tail follow a single 10-cell path: left base up to the apex, down the right rim, then through (4,4) → center → (4,2) for a crossing loop.

items.name: cell-angle-18
items.title: Hollow Shell
items.description: The heart cell stays locked dim while every other triangle dot breathes together in phase — a hollow, ring-like pulse.

items.name: cell-angle-19
items.title: Pivot Ray
items.description: A Gaussian wedge of brightness rotates around the heart cell using each dot’s polar angle — a clear pivoting searchlight, not a cosine-product moiré field.

items.name: cell-angle-20
items.title: Twin Perimeter
items.description: Two stepped heads chase the outer perimeter path half a lap apart, each with its own tail; the heart cell stays quietly dim off the loop.

items.name: cell-lattice-1
items.title: Hex Orbit
items.description: A 3-4-5-4-3 hexagonal dot field with two soft perimeter heads chasing around the shell while the center stays quietly lit.

items.name: cell-lattice-2
items.title: Prism Bloom
items.description: Three rotating spokes sweep through the hex field with a soft outer shell pulse and a breathing center point.

items.name: cell-lattice-3
items.title: Honey Gate
items.description: Two diagonal bands slide through the honeycomb from opposite sides, meeting in a bright center flash before opening again.

items.name: cell-lattice-4
items.title: Vertex Relay
items.description: A bright signal hands off around the hex vertices while inner echo dots answer each corner and the center keeps a quick pulse.

items.name: cell-lattice-5
items.title: Spiral Lattice
items.description: Counter-rotating spiral waves cross through the hex lattice, creating a fast core pulse and softer outer wake.

items.name: cell-lattice-6
items.title: Chevron March
items.description: Smooth chevron bands flow through the hex field in a wrapped loop, keeping an obvious arrow pattern without a reset snap.

items.name: cell-lattice-7
items.title: Hourglass Flip
items.description: Top and bottom bars squeeze into a bright center hourglass, then flip into side rails and a diamond.

items.name: cell-lattice-8
items.title: Glyph Flip
items.description: Crisp symbolic masks flip between stars, chevrons, and rails for a snappy pixel-glyph loader.

items.name: cell-lattice-9
items.title: Petal Shimmer
items.description: A four-petal highlight rotates through the hex with a soft shell sheen and steady center glow.

items.name: cell-lattice-10
items.title: Liquid Vortex
items.description: Refined swirl bands and a slower lens highlight create a smoother liquid shimmer through the hex lattice.

items.name: all
items.title: All CellForge Loaders
items.description: Installs every CellForge loader and shared runtime files in one command.
